data.title: Walmart Q4 Earnings Shine, But Soft FY26 Outlook Disappoints Street
data.description: Walmart reported a 4.1% sales increase in Q4 FY25, reaching $180.60 billion, surpassing expectations. Despite strong results, Walmart's FY26 guidance falls below analyst projections for adjusted EPS.

data.title: Alibaba Q3 Earnings: Revenue And EPS Beat, Eyes Global E-Commerce Profitability In FY25, Increase Investments In AI
data.description: Alibaba (NYSE: BABA) reported strong fiscal Q3 results, with revenue of $38.38B (+8% Y/Y) and earnings per ADS of $2.93, beating analyst estimates. Stock up 3.80%.

data.title: Jeff Bezos' Ex-Wife MacKenzie Scott's $19B Donations Are Transforming 2,000+ Nonprofits: Report
data.description: The ex-wife of Jeff Bezos, MacKenzie Scott's unrestricted gifts totaling over $19 billion have significantly transformed more than 2,000 nonprofit organizations over the past five years, according to recent research.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: KULR Secures AS9100 Certification, Paving Way For Aerospace And Military Expansion
data.description: KULR Tech's Webster, TX facility achieves AS9100 certification, highlighting their commitment to quality in aerospace and defense manufacturing.

data.title: Leading And Lagging Sectors For February 20, 2025
